page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.26xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. It features 104 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, translating to 104 vCPUs. The memory configuration consists of 384.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 3.69 GB of memory per core.

This instance is equipped with 5759 GB of local SSD storage, offering high-capacity local disk space directly attached to the virtual machine. The network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The virtualization layer is managed via the KVM hypervisor, ensuring dedicated resource allocation without CPU overcommit.

Given the combination of 104 dedicated cores and nearly 6 TB of local SSD storage, this instance is designed for storage-intensive and database workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, and distributed file systems that require high local storage capacity and high-throughput network performance. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance for resource-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.26xlarge is a high-capacity storage and database instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 104 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding 3.69 GB of memory per core, and includes 5759 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput transactional workloads that require substantial local storage capacity and dedicated compute resources without CPU sharing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.26xlarge is a dedicated server featuring 104 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, 5759 GB of local SSD storage, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for storage-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.26xlarge features 104 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 5759 GB local SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
tagline: High-core dedicated compute paired with massive local SSD storage and high-speed networking for demanding database and storage-intensive workloads.
